reference: Hello, two point five weeks ago I was hit in the shin with a baseball. There is quite a large lump on my shin and still a lot of bruising. My leg aches and there is still swelling in the evenings. I had an X-ray and was told there is no break. Is it possible to have a hairline fracture that was not detected in the X-ray? I will be traveling in a couple of weeks and am worried about the amount of walking I will be doing.
text: If you could please talk to me like one of the preschoolers on Sesame Street, that would be great.
